per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA mentions providing a verbal summary instead of a detailed Transparency Note, while the REG requires that an appropriate type and degree of transparency be ensured. The texts do not clearly express the same specific constraint, so no quote-supported mismatch can be established.

The REA concerns a communication artifact ('verbal summary' versus 'detailed Transparency Note'), whereas the REG concerns system design and development to ensure sufficiently transparent operation. These are not clearly the same constraint, so no direct conflict is supported by the text.

The REA discusses providing a transparency note or verbal summary to a customer contact, while the REG requires the provider to draw up technical documentation. Because the obligations address different artifacts and acts, there is no clear quote-supported mismatch.
